description: Unique security identifier.
Index weight from base universe normalised to sum to 1.
Country of classification per GIMI Methodology; determines reporting currency and share-count methodology.
GICS Industry Group code; controls which per-share figures are published (Banks 4010: no SPS or CEPS; Insurance 4030: no CEPS).
Total shares at company level at date of results; all classes including unlisted aggregated; stock options warrants and convertibles excluded; treasury shares excluded.
Average shares outstanding over the reporting period; used instead of period-end shares for EPS CEPS SPS in US Canada UK Ireland.
Basis on which fundamental data is reported; MSCI uses consolidated data by default non-consolidated only when consolidated is unavailable.
Net income from continuing operations available to all equity shareholders excluding extraordinary items minority interest and preferred dividends; adjusted for non-recurring items.
Net operating revenues from all ongoing lines of business; excise tax deducted; Banks (GICS 4010) excluded; Insurance (4030) uses net premiums earned.
Earnings plus depreciation and amortization as reported; where amortization not reported only depreciation added; latest fiscal D&A used if not in interim statements.
Annualized dividend per share; gross before withholding tax; excludes special dividends unless paid three consecutive years; excludes extraordinary capital repayments.
Shareholders equity at latest period end excluding minority interest treasury shares and preferred shares without equity-like characteristics.
End date of the company's most recent reported financial period.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "1.2 Historical Per Share Data Calculations"

description: Date on which per-share and ratio calculations are performed; used to measure the reporting gap against financial_period_end_date.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "1.2 Historical Per Share Data Calculations"

description: Consensus analysts EPS estimate for the current fiscal year from Thomson I/B/E/S (Toyo Keizai for Japan securities not covered by I/B/E/S).
Consensus analysts EPS estimate for the next fiscal year from Thomson I/B/E/S.
Number of months remaining before the current fiscal year end (M in EPS12F/EPS12B formulas).
EPS from the last fully reported fiscal year; used as EPS0 in EPS12B calculation.
Long-term forward EPS growth rate; consensus of analysts estimates typically for 3 to 5 years; suppressed when outlier with single contributor.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "2.2.6 Long-Term Forward Earnings Per Share Growth Rate (EGRLF)"

description: Number of analyst contributors to the EGRLF consensus estimate.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "2.2.6 Long-Term Forward Earnings Per Share Growth Rate (EGRLF)"

description: List of up to 5 annual fiscal year-end EPS values used for EGRO and EVAR calculations.
List of up to 5 annual fiscal year-end SPS values used for SGRO calculation.
Price adjustment factor (PAF) applied at the ex-date of a capital structure event; ratio of ex-price to cum-price.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "4.1 Nominal Changes in Capital Structure"

description: Cumulative consumer price inflation for the country over the most recent 3-year period; triggers hyperinflationary treatment at or near 100%.
Gain or loss from revaluation of investment property reported by Real Estate companies (GICS Sector 60); excluded from MSCI trailing and historical EPS as a non-recurring item.
source: methbooks/data/markdown/MSCI_Fundamental_Data_Methodology_20240625.md section "Appendix I: MSCI's Treatment of Some Specific Aspects of IFRS"
